boxes.text:
Algorithm 2 Sampling with the proposed
Gibbs Sampling
: {σt}T=0, K
Require:
Inittilize xT
for t ← T to 1 do
for k ← 1 to K do
Draw xk+1 ∼ p(xt+1|xt = xk)
Draw xk ∼ qθ(xt|xt+1 = xk+1)
end for
← x
K
end for
return x0
